Okay, again, this picture gets kind of intense.
So the wow and how, basically this is the core script of that video, big promise, kill common myths, wait, big promise, content piece number one, kill the myths and then hook to video number two.
Video number two now is transformational education.
Let's do it together, proof it's working, how I can do it, which is the content for number two, and then number four is you're hooking to video number three.
Here's video number three, the ownership experience.
Boom, step one, you future pace them on what's gonna happen to them for having this.
Number two, you're gonna hit them to the offer.
It's gonna be coming up on video number four.
Where three, you show how you do it.
Number four, you hook to the offer video.
Here's the offer video, boom, step one, here's what I've got, here's what you'll do with it, here's what I'll do for you, and here's what you need to do right now.
Okay, I know guys, this is a lot, this is like so much stuff, I feel bad that we're jamming on your mind, but I want you guys to have this so that you can understand that.
I wanna do a product launch, and then come back to this, and I can dig deeper and figure out, okay, what's my big promise?
What are the common myths I need to kill?
And you can use this as a template if you decide that you're gonna create a product launch funnel, okay?
